history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young person wearing a black hoodie with a high collar that covers their face, black sweatpants with white drawstrings, and black Adidas sneakers with white stripes is sitting on a tiled ledge. They are wearing a black baseball cap with "CONFLICT" written in red. The person is holding up two fingers in a peace sign with their left hand and has their right hand near their face, also holding up two fingers. To their left, on the ledge, is a white tote bag with black graffiti-style drawings and red handles. The background features a dark brown wooden panel on the left, lush green plants, and a building with glass doors and white pillars. The lighting is natural and appears to be overcast, casting soft shadows. The overall color palette is dominated by black, white, green, and brown, with a touch of red from the bag and cap. The mood is casual and relaxed, with a hint of urban street style.
